dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your Cloudflare accounts, zones, and monitor DDNS updates.

accounts.title: TetherDNS Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage your Cloudflare API credentials
accounts.add_modal_desc: Enter your Cloudflare API credentials below
accounts.label_hint: A friendly name to identify this account.

zones.title: Active Zones
zones.subtitle: Domains managed under your Cloudflare accounts
zones.no_accounts_warning: Please add a Cloudflare Account first from the Settings or Accounts tab to use TetherDNS.
zones.add_modal_desc: Add a new DNS zone to manage
zones.account_hint: Select the account that manages this domain in TetherDNS.
zones.domain_hint: Enter the root domain name exactly as it appears in TetherDNS.
zones.import_modal_desc: Fetch all zones from the selected Cloudflare account and add them to TetherDNS.
zones.import_info: Select an account to import all its zones. Existing zones will be skipped.
zones.delete_modal_text: This action will remove the Zone from TetherDNS tracking. Cloudflare records will remain intact unless manually deleted on their dashboard.

records.title: DNS Records
records.subtitle: Manage A, AAAA, CNAME records. Toggle DDNS to auto-update IP.
records.add_modal_desc: Create a new DNS record via TetherDNS
records.edit_modal_desc: Modify this DNS record on Cloudflare using TetherDNS
records.ddns_hint: TetherDNS will automatically update this record's IP when your global IP changes.
records.delete_confirm: Do you want to permanently delete record {name}?
records.delete_warning: This action will remove the Record from TetherDNS and Cloudflare too.
records.api_desc: You can trigger an IP update for this record by making a GET or POST request to this URL.
records.history_empty: No recorded IP changes found in history.

logs.title: DDNS Update Logs
logs.subtitle: History of IP address changes from DDNS auto-update

audit.title: Audit Trail
audit.subtitle: Log of all actions performed in TetherDNS

ddns_warning.title: ⚠️ Type Change Warning
ddns_warning.subtitle: Record type will be changed
ddns_warning.desc1: DDNS Auto-Update works by updating the IP automatically, which requires the record to be Type A.
ddns_warning.desc2: Record {name} is currently Type {type} → it will be automatically changed to Type A.
